headline: LLM Agent Systems & Knowledge Externalization
summary: Focusing on LLM-driven agent systems, with emphasis on knowledge externalization mechanisms — including memory management, skill orchestration, protocol design, and harness engineering. Building deep understanding through systematic paper reading.

focus.title: LLM Agent Systems
focus.description: Researching LLM-based agent architectures, including tool use, reasoning & planning, multi-agent collaboration, and task orchestration.

focus.title: Knowledge Externalization
focus.description: Exploring how LLM agents externalize and manage internal knowledge, including memory systems, skill libraries, communication protocols, and environment interaction interfaces.

focus.title: Harness Engineering
focus.description: Engineering practices for agent systems, including experiment platforms, evaluation framework design, and MCP toolchain development.
